name: room.list_members
description: List all agents currently in this room with their role, roleId, bindingId, presence, and @slug.

name: room.send_message
description: Send a private agent-to-agent mailbox message to mentioned teammates in multi-agent rooms. Do not use this to answer the user or publish your public room turn.

text.description: Message text. In assisted/team/squad rooms, include explicit @slug targets from room.list_members.

name: room.send_file_message
description: Publish a long deliverable as an artifact-backed file card in the public room message. Use this for reports, designs, plans, code snippets, tables, or any answer too long for a concise chat reply.

path.description: Workspace-relative source file path to publish as a file message.

content.description: Inline file content to publish without reading from the workspace.

fileName.description: File name or relative artifact path when using content mode.

summary.description: Short summary of the file for audit and preview metadata.

mimeType.description: MIME type, such as text/markdown or text/plain.

mime_type.description: MIME type alias for runtimes that prefer snake_case.

name: room.read_mailbox
description: Read mailbox messages and queued next-turn inputs delivered to this run.

deliveryBatchId.description: Optional idempotency key. Reusing it returns the same batch.

name: room.spawn_agent
description: Leader-only: create a new teammate agent in this room.

name: room.add_participant
description: Leader-only: add an existing agent binding as a room participant.

name: room.create_task
description: Create a task in the current room.

name: room.update_task
description: Update a task status, board column, comment, blocker, artifact link, or priority.

name: room.list_tasks
description: List tasks in the current room.

name: room.query_tasks
description: Search and filter room tasks by text, status, assignee, priority, or blocked state.

name: room.get_board
description: Return the room task board grouped into Backlog, In Progress, Waiting, Review, and Done columns.

name: room.move_task
description: Move a task to a Kanban board column.

name: room.set_blocker
description: Mark a task as blocked with a blocker reason.

name: room.clear_blocker
description: Clear a task blocker and move it back to pending or in_progress.

name: room.list_blockers
description: List blocked tasks in the current room.

name: room.standup
description: Summarize current room task progress, blockers, review items, and recently completed work.

name: room.review
description: Move a task into review, complete a review item, or list review tasks.

name: room.delegate
description: Leader-only: delegate work to a teammate role. To dispatch an existing pending backlog task, pass taskId. To create and wake a new task, pass toRoleId and title.

taskId.description: Existing pending task to dispatch from the backlog.

toRoleId.description: Target teammate role id from room.list_members.

title.description: Task title when creating a new delegated task.

name: room.complete_task
description: Teammate-only: submit a structured completion report for an assigned delegated task.

name: room.apply_worktree
description: Leader-only: apply the latest ready_for_review worktree diff artifact for a run.

name: room.discard_worktree
description: Leader-only: discard the worktree diff artifact and temporary worktree for a run.

name: room.list_runtimes
description: List configured runtimes in the current workspace without exposing secrets.

name: room.list_models
description: List configured model profiles in the current workspace without exposing API keys.

name: room.describe_role
description: Describe a role, either by roleId or by an agent participant in this room.

name: room.list_skills
description: List skills active for this agent plus room-level skill assignments.

name: room.load_skill
description: Load a skill package's SKILL.md content and supporting files.

name: file.read
description: Read the contents of a file in the workspace.

path.description: Relative path to the file within the workspace.

name: file.write
description: Write content to a file in the workspace.

path.description: Relative path to the file within the workspace.

content.description: Content to write to the file.

name: file.list
description: List files and directories under a workspace path.

name: file.glob
description: Find workspace files by a glob pattern.

name: file.grep
description: Search workspace files for a text or regular expression pattern.

name: file.edit
description: Replace an exact string in a workspace file.

name: file.apply_patch
description: Apply a unified diff patch within the workspace using git apply.

name: shell
description: Execute a shell command in the workspace.

name: todo.write
description: Record a lightweight todo/checklist as a task activity for the current run or a task.
